title: Develop community networks
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop community networks demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Make contacts within community

pcs.text: Make connections through business, social and personal contacts, and programs to the community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make connections through business, social and personal contacts, and programs to the community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make connections through business, social and personal contacts, and programs to the community.

pcs.text: Identify connections for their potential in regard to a community group program or activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify connections for their potential in regard to a community group program or activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify connections for their potential in regard to a community group program or activity.

pcs.text: Formulate plans for developing relationships together with relevant community members and leaders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Formulate plans for developing relationships together with relevant community members and leaders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Formulate plans for developing relationships together with relevant community members and leaders.

pcs.text: Respect equity requirements and cultural backgrounds of people being contacted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Respect equity requirements and cultural backgrounds of people being contacted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Respect equity requirements and cultural backgrounds of people being contacted.

pcs.text: Apply cultural protocols to establish positive contacts
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply cultural protocols to establish positive contacts?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply cultural protocols to establish positive contacts.

pcs.text: Follow appropriate mechanisms to establish contacts with Indigenous communities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow appropriate mechanisms to establish contacts with Indigenous communities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow appropriate mechanisms to establish contacts with Indigenous communities.

pcs.text: Address community requests for information on or participation in programs or activities to promote the community group and program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Address community requests for information on or participation in programs or activities to promote the community group and program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address community requests for information on or participation in programs or activities to promote the community group and program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Make contacts within community

elements.title: Form and create links

pcs.text: Develop contact through promotional activities, programs and activities of mutual interest to community members and other groups

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop contact through promotional activities, programs and activities of mutual interest to community members and other groups.

pcs.text: Structure activities, programs and personal contact to allow trust and understanding to develop within the group and community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Structure activities, programs and personal contact to allow trust and understanding to develop within the group and community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Structure activities, programs and personal contact to allow trust and understanding to develop within the group and community.

pcs.text: Develop working relationships in areas of common interest and goals to bring benefit to all parties
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop working relationships in areas of common interest and goals to bring benefit to all parties?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop working relationships in areas of common interest and goals to bring benefit to all parties.

pcs.text: Seek feedback on programs and community group activities from participants and community, and use to modify their application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek feedback on programs and community group activities from participants and community, and use to modify their application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek feedback on programs and community group activities from participants and community, and use to modify their application.

pcs.text: Develop and maintain records of ongoing contacts and relationships
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and maintain records of ongoing contacts and relationships?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and maintain records of ongoing contacts and relationships.

elements.title: Build networks

pcs.text: Use individual contacts and contacts with other groups to establish networks of common interest

pcs.text: Evaluate progress in establishing links and networks, and identify opportunities for further action

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate progress in establishing links and networks, and identify opportunities for further action.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage relationships and networks to ensure compliance with cultural protocols and agency procedures and guidelines.
